title: Create LICHEN multi-runtime fleet AMI
description: Build and validate an ARM64 us-west-2 AMI in personal AWS account 210337117346 for Zephyr-in-Renode plus native Rust and Python fleet nodes. Bake runtimes and dependencies only; exclude repository state and credentials. Tag all temporary and resulting resources Project=LICHEN.
close_reason: Created, validated, documented, and wired LICHEN fleet AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f
